hooks.command: if printf '%s\n' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -E '(^|/)\.env($|\.)' | grep -vE '\.env\.example$' >/dev/null; then echo 'Blocked: .env files must not be created or edited (public repo). Use .env.example as the template.' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILES=$(printf '%s\n' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -E '\.py$' || true); if [ -n "$FILES" ] && command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "$FILES" | xargs black --quiet 2>&1 || true; fi; if [ -n "$FILES" ] && command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "$FILES" | xargs ruff check --fix --quiet 2>&1 || true; fi
